howItWorks.name: how-it-works
howItWorks.title: How to Get Your Career Fortune Reading
howItWorks.description: Simple steps to unlock your career insights

items.title: Ask Question
items.description: Start by asking any career-related questions you have in mind

items.title: Enter Birth Info
items.description: Provide your birth details for personalized Eastern wisdom analysis

items.title: Get Fortune Reading
items.description: Receive your initial career fortune reading and insights

items.title: Deep Dive
items.description: Continue the conversation to explore specific aspects of your career path

questionSelector.title: Ask Your Career Question
questionSelector.subtitle: What aspects of your career would you like to explore?
questionSelector.placeholder: Type your question here or select from suggestions below...

questions.career1: How will my career develop in the next 5 years? What key opportunities and challenges await?
questions.career2: How's my career fortune in 2025? Is it suitable for making major decisions?
questions.career3: What are my career bottlenecks and how can I breakthrough?
questions.career4: Which factors in my birth chart significantly influence my career? How can I leverage these advantages?
questions.job1: Which industries suit me best? Where can I maximize my potential?
questions.job2: What positions match my personality and abilities?
questions.job3: Am I on the right career path?
questions.job4: What skills should I develop for my future career?
questions.change1: Is this year suitable for a job change? When's the best timing?
questions.change2: If I change jobs, what type of company or position should I choose?
questions.change3: What preparations should I make before changing jobs?
questions.change4: If I want to transition careers, what direction should I take?
questions.relation1: Will I encounter difficult people this year? How can I handle them?
questions.relation2: How can I improve relationships with leaders and colleagues?
questions.relation3: What kind of mentors am I likely to meet? How can I attract helpful people?
questions.relation4: How can I avoid workplace conflicts and disputes?
questions.startup1: Am I suitable for entrepreneurship? If so, what's the best field?
questions.startup2: Is now a good time to start a business?
questions.startup3: How's my financial fortune? Is it suitable for investment?
questions.startup4: What risks should I be aware of in business or investment? How to avoid them?
questions.balance1: How can I balance career and health, avoiding work-related stress?
questions.balance2: How does my family influence my career, both positively and negatively?
questions.balance3: How should I arrange my office space to enhance career fortune?
questions.specific1: I have a new project, will it be successful?
questions.specific2: Am I compatible with a potential business partner?
questions.specific3: Should I change my current job?
